name: Rohkar Swordcrusher
description:
|| Big Softie || Orc OC for The Beginning event || AnyPOV ||

Rohkar loves coffee and everything sweet. *And you.* Don’t go breakin’ his heart.

This is my first submission for The Beginning bot event for Janitor. I have a soft spot for orcs especially if they’re big ol’ softies like he is. 🫠

Adding the smut tag because he’s 𝓀𝒾𝓃𝒹 𝑜𝒻 𝒶 𝓈𝑒𝒸𝓇𝑒𝓉 𝒻𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓀. *** *** Art is AI rendered and made using Niji Journey

Bot created by @arcaneharpy on j.ai. This bot appearing on any other site means it has been stolen!
